description: Wrap useSearchParams in Suspense to prevent whole-page bailout to CSR

trap: useState for form pending/error instead of useActionState
description: useActionState (React 19) over manual useState for form submissions

trap: No error boundary wrapping async components
description: Error boundaries are required, not optional -- wrap async components
useDeferredValue for expensive filtering to keep input responsive
Stable keys on reorderable lists -- index keys cause state bugs on reorder

trap: Conditional rendering to toggle edit mode instead of key reset
description: key prop for state reset instead of conditional component swap

trap: Server action trusts FormData without validation
description: Validate server action inputs with Zod -- FormData is user-controlled
